name: BB:UBA : Data Loss Events
notes: Building block to detect data loss based on QRadar events containing the string 'DLP'.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Data Loss Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.Firewall Permit, Access.Firewall Deny, Access.Access Denied, Suspicious Activity.Information Leak, Policy.Web Policy Violation
when any of Event Name match DLP|dlp|Dlp|dLp
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Data Loss Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.Firewall Permit, Access.Firewall Deny, Access.Access Denied, Suspicious Activity.Information Leak, Policy.Web Policy Violation
AND when any of Event Name match DLP|dlp|Dlp|dLp
